hooks.command: API_BASE_URL=$(grep -oE 'API_BASE_URL=[^ ]+' CLAUDE.md 2>/dev/null | cut -d= -f2); curl -s "$API_BASE_URL/alertas/sem-resposta?min=30" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); t=d.get('total') or d.get('data',{}).get('total',0); print(f'\u26a0\ufe0f  {t} grupo(s) aguardando resposta')" 2>/dev/null || true
